creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
Created attachment 225681
git diff for devel/lua-gettext

While there's nothing wrong with this port,
it works as intended. It's suffering from a
bit of rot. So I wanted to look at making
some changes to this and find there's no to
contact the original author.
I'm hijacking it -- it's pointless to be a
maintainer, if you can't maintain it. ;-)
Anyway. I added a license, moved hosting to
GitLab in an effort to get more attention.
I'm currently working on making the minimum
lua version start at 52.

Changes
Makefile

Additions
README's
CHANGELOG
LICENSE

make (check-plist|stage-qa|check-sanity|portlint) return AOK
on 12 && 13 amd64

That's it.

Thanks!

--Chris
